description: A homeowner installed solar panels on their roof and wants to claim the federal tax credit.

nodes.task_description: Gather the invoices and proof of payment for the solar panel installation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects documentation showing the total cost of the project.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the solar panels are qualifying property for the credit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the property is eligible.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the credit amount based on the applicable percentage of the cost and complete Form 5695.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the credit and prepares the required form.
